_comment: Countries: US / UK / CA / any ('Other' matches only 'any' actions + fallbacks; Australia folds here). Filtered by countries + timeBuckets, dropped if active=false, sorted by importanceRank (1=top). Ranking rule: engine floats a user's own-country rep_contact action above cross-cutting corporate actions (PRD D5). 'weekly' bucket renders a 'set a weekly reminder' button (calendar link, NOT email). Every card also shows a universal 'Sign up for TBFighters emails' button -> emailSignupUrl. type controls future embedding only; in the MVP every type routes out via actionUrl. immediate:false => future-event CTA. TODO links need confirming.
emailSignupUrl: TODO: confirm TBFighters email signup URL (used by the universal Sign up button on every card)

actions.title: Tell your reps to release the withheld PEPFAR funding
actions.blurb: Congress already approved this money; it's being withheld. Ask your representatives to demand it's released now.
actions.weeklyNudge: Set a weekly reminder to call — sustained pressure is what moves funding.

actions.title: Email Danaher to release their audit
actions.blurb: Danaher promised an independent audit of their TB test costs over two years ago and still hasn't published it.
actions.weeklyNudge: Set a weekly reminder to send a fresh message — every one counts.

actions.title: Contact your MP about TB funding
actions.blurb: Ask your Member of Parliament to back funding for the global TB response.
actions.actionUrl: TODO: confirm UK Act Now link from tbfighters.org/action (later: in-tool postcode -> MP lookup)
actions.weeklyNudge: Set a weekly reminder — repeated contact from constituents is what moves MPs.

actions.title: Contact your MP about TB funding
actions.blurb: Ask your Member of Parliament to support Canada's contribution to ending TB.
actions.actionUrl: TODO: confirm Canada Act Now link (likely RESULTS Canada) — no verified TBFighters Canada action yet
actions.weeklyNudge: Set a weekly reminder — consistent constituent contact keeps TB on the agenda.

actions.title: Get your reps to sign the Dear Colleague letters
actions.blurb: Ask your senators and representative to sign on to the letters supporting domestic and global TB funding.

actions.title: Join TB Hill Day in Washington, DC
actions.blurb: Advocate for TB funding in person on Capitol Hill alongside survivors and experts.
actions._activeNote: 2026 applications are CLOSED. Flip active to true when they reopen; immediate:false keeps it as a sign-up CTA, not a do-now card.

actions.title: Bring a friend into the fight
actions.blurb: Share the campaign with someone who'd care — more voices is the highest-leverage thing you can do with extra time.
